creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171983
seafile-gui.diff

This port an update to the seafile client applet.

* Updated to 5.1.3

- Support syncing any sub-folder with a community server
- [fix, pro] Fix auto-completion in sharing a folder to a user
- auto-login for open file history in web
- Prevent generating too many "case conflict" files

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: Consider adding support for a NLS knob to conditionally disable gettext support.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

poudriere bulk -tC:
11amd64: success
11i386: success
101amd64: success
101i386: success
93amd64: spdylay requires OpenSSL 1.0.1+
93i386: spdylay requires OpenSSL 1.0.1+
